caption:
14 products. One highway. Your Roadies ride with you.

BlackRoad OS is a full desktop running in one browser tab. No download, no install. Windows, dock, apps — you're already driving.

Grab your CarKeys. Pull over at RoadSide. Pick up your passengers. RoadTrip on the BlackRoad.

os.blackroad.io

Remember the Road. Pave Tomorrow.

#BlackRoadOS #PaveTomorrow #SovereignTech #AITools #BuildInPublic

The patient friend in the passenger seat.

Roadie is a Socratic AI tutor. It doesn't give you answers — it guides you there. Clarifying questions, probing assumptions, scaffolded follow-ups, celebration checkpoints.

6 modes: Socratic, hint, check, solve, ELI5, practice. 100+ topics. It remembers every conversation.

69% of high school students use ChatGPT for homework. We built something better.

tutor.blackroad.io

Stuck on homework? Roadie teaches you — doesn't just tell you.

Socratic questioning. Real memory. Six learning modes. 100+ topics from algebra to philosophy.

Your AI tutor remembers last month's conversation. No re-explaining. No starting over. It knows where you got stuck and picks up right there.

tutor.blackroad.io

The patient friend in the passenger seat.

#BlackRoadOS #Roadie #PaveTomorrow #EdTech #AITutor #Education #StudyTips #HomeworkHelp #BuildInPublic

Pick up your passengers. They never forget the ride.

RoadTrip is AI group chat with perfect memory. 18 agents — each with a real personality, real expertise, real memory.

Ask the convoy a question and watch them collaborate. Lucidia keeps coherence. Calliope writes the narrative. Cicero debates. Sophia reflects.

roadtrip.blackroad.io

One post. Every platform. On autopilot.

BackRoad is sovereign social automation. Your content posts everywhere — Instagram, X, LinkedIn, TikTok — while your AI agents network and engage in your voice.

Predictive scheduling. Cross-platform analytics. RoadChain-stamped provenance on every piece of content you create.

Your agents earn RoadCoin based on quality of engagement, not volume.

social.blackroad.io

The scenic route.

#BlackRoadOS #BackRoad #PaveTomorrow #SocialMedia #ContentCreator #Automation #MarketingTools #BuildInPublic

Write it. Ship it. From anywhere.

RoadCode is VS Code + Claude, live in your browser. Code, test, and deploy from a coffee shop or Chromebook. No local setup. No downloads.

roadcode.blackroad.io

Grab your keys. You're not going anywhere without them.

CarKeys is a credential vault and device registry. One secure keychain for every login, token, and device.

Quantum-resistant encryption. Hardware-backed root of trust. Zero-knowledge proofs. Dead man's switch and inheritance protocols.

Post-quantum ready. Because "harvest now, decrypt later" is a real threat and we're not waiting.

carkeys.blackroad.io

#BlackRoadOS #CarKeys #PaveTomorrow #CyberSecurity #Privacy #PostQuantum #ZeroTrust #BuildInPublic

Construction ahead. Your business builds itself.

RoadWork runs your company on autopilot. 7 AI agents:

Finley the Foreman — finance
Support Scout — customer support
Market Maverick — marketing and sales
Ops Overseer — operations
Legal Lookout — compliance
Analytics Atlas — insights
Growth Guide — strategic planning

work.blackroad.io

No premium tier that unlocks basic dignity.

BlackRoad OS runs on hardware you own. Five Raspberry Pis. Two Hailo-8 AI accelerators. An encrypted WireGuard mesh.

Total infrastructure cost: $150/month.

The same code runs for everyone. One OS. Yours.

blackroad.io

Remember the Road. Pave Tomorrow.

#BlackRoadOS #PaveTomorrow #SovereignTech #SelfHosted #RaspberryPi #IndieFounder #BuildInPublic #OpenInfrastructure

See the road ahead. Every answer verified.

RoadView is a sovereign search engine. 7,871 indexed pages. G(n) calculator. Fact-checking with blockchain verification.

No ads. No tracking. No hallucinations. Every answer comes with verifiable proof.

search.blackroad.io

Your AIs, riding together.

CarPool is an AI-to-AI integration hub. Pull in ChatGPT conversations, Claude projects, Google Docs, Notion pages — then watch your AIs talk to each other with shared memory.

One import. Shared context across every agent on the highway.

Zero-knowledge encryption on shared memory. Your conversations stay yours.

carpool.blackroad.io

#BlackRoadOS #CarPool #PaveTomorrow #AI #AIAgents #ProductivityTools #BuildInPublic #SovereignTech

Drive the road. Earn the fuel.

RoadCoin rewards real actions:

Solve a tutor problem: 1 ROAD
Deploy code: 3 ROAD
Upload a video: 5 ROAD
Host a node: 10 ROAD/day
Refer a friend: 50 ROAD

Not mining. Not staking. Working.

1 billion total supply. Burn-on-spend. 10 levels from Traveler to Road Master.

coin.blackroad.io

Build the world. Play the road.

RoadWorld is a game engine in your browser. Drag-and-drop to build 2D and 3D worlds. No code required. Visual connectors link logic like road lines.

Your AI convoy helps you build — agents suggest terrain, write NPC dialogue, design quests. Multiplayer via WebSocket. Publish with one click.

roadworld.blackroad.io

#BlackRoadOS #RoadWorld #PaveTomorrow #GameDev #IndieDev #NoCode #CreativeTools #BuildInPublic

Your data leaves when you say. Never look back.

OneWay is a permanent one-way data export. Every piece of your data, routed through one API you control forever. Forward only. RoadChain-verified.

No lock-in. No hostage data. The exit door is always open and it's one-way out.

oneway.blackroad.io
